settings.heading: Can I use any vacuum cleaner on velvet furniture?
settings.text: It’s best to use a vacuum cleaner with a soft brush attachment to avoid damaging the delicate fibres of velvet.

settings.heading: How often should I professionally clean my bed?
settings.text: For high-use items like beds, a professional clean every 6 to 12 months is recommended.

settings.heading: What should I do if my bed with storage gets stained?
settings.text: Blot the stain immediately and use a mild cleaning solution or consult a professional if the stain is severe.

settings.heading: Are there specific products for Naple’s fabric?
settings.text: Yes, use cleaning products designed for delicate fabrics and always test on a small area first.

settings.heading: How do I prevent fading on my super king bed?
settings.text: Keep the bed out of direct sunlight and use protective covers to maintain the fabric’s colour.
